(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]
  (if (= action :tick)
    (let [current-light (:light state)]
      (assoc state :light
             (case current-light
               :red :green
               :green :yellow
               :yellow :red)))
    state))
(fn [n] (let [fizz (zero? (mod n 3)) buzz (zero? (mod n 5))] (cond (and fizz buzz) "FizzBuzz" fizz "Fizz" buzz "Buzz" :else (str n))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))

(fn [a b]
  (loop [x a y b]
    (if (= y 0)
      x
      (recur y (mod x y)))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))
